'''Doman Beruss''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of [[Clan Beruss]] who had died long before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Likely living on [[Illodia]], he had at least [[Doman Beruss (Corellian)|two]] [[Doman Beruss (Illodian)|descendants]] named after him.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] {{1stm}}
